data.title: Global funds return to India as earnings outlook improves
data.description: The rebound in inflows suggests some of the pressures that had been weighing on Indian equities are starting to ease
data.content:
Foreign investors are returning to Indian stocks at the fastest pace in eight months, supported by stabilizing corporate earnings and a US trade deal that improves the outlook for the months ahead.
